sections: Diving at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships – Women's 3 metre springboard
first_paragraph: The **women's 3 metre springboard** competition of the [diving events](/wiki/Diving_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Diving at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the [2011 World Aquatics Championships](/wiki/2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "2011 World Aquatics Championships") was held on July 22 with the preliminary round and the semifinal and the final on 23 July.

The **women's 3 metre springboard** competition of the [diving events](/wiki/Diving_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Diving at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the [2011 World Aquatics Championships](/wiki/2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "2011 World Aquatics Championships") was held on July 22 with the preliminary round and the semifinal and the final on 23 July.
